variants.title: HiFi Filter OT 5085 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59210
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OT 5085 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59210
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OT 5085 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO 59210. Easy to install and replace, the OT 5085 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR/OIL SEPARATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 218.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 190.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 168.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 188.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 160.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P785382 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59210
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P785382 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59210
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P785382 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.

variants.title: Mann Filter LE 9004 Compressed Air-Oil Separation | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59210
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter LE 9004 Compressed Air-Oil Separation | Replaces the SF Filter SAO 59210
variants.description: MANN-FILTER air deoiling elements reliably separate oil from the compressed air in compressors and vacuum pumps. This is how they ensure clean air, prolong the service life of the equipment and provide optimum performance. High-quality media for air deoiling elements from the technology leader MANN-FILTER ensure a high separation rate and a low residual oil content. This minimizes oil loss and leads to low energy and oil consumption over the entire service life.
specifications: Style: Compressed Air-Oil Separation, Dimension A: 220.0 mm, Dimension C: 170.0 mm, Dimension H: 160.0 mm
